actionLibraryList.title: Dynamic Hamstring Stretch
actionLibraryList.context: Keep your upper body upright and bend forward as far as you can.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1753410285189.jpg","context":"1.Front leg straight, dorsiflex the foot.\n2.Back leg slightly bent.\n3.Shift your weight onto the back leg."}]
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel the stretch in the back of your thighs.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Avoid rounding your shoulders or arching your back during the movement.

actionLibraryList.title: Seated 90/90 Stretch
actionLibraryList.context: Alternatively rotate your hips, keep your upper body upright, and maintain a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice2Txt: Sit on the floor with your legs split. Bend one knee and bring it out to the side, creating a 90-degree angle at your hip and knee.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice3Txt: Alternatively roatate your hip, keep your upper body upright, always keep a 90-degree angle at your hip and knee.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice4Txt: Complete the full range of motion.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749718178177.jpg","context":"1.Rotate your hips alternately.\n2.Maintain a neutral spine position.\n3.Keep your hips and knees at a 90° angle throughout."}]
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Ensure a full range of motion.

actionLibraryList.title: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than hip-width.
2.Keep your shoulders back, core engaged, and knees slightly bent.
3.Begin driving your hips backward.
4.Avoid excessive knee bending or losing proper posture in your upper body.
5.Continue bending, feeling the stretch in your hamstrings.
6.Pause briefly at the bottom position, then drive your hips forward to return to standing.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice1Txt: Lock the pulleys to the floor with the barbell attached.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice2Txt: Start by establishing a neutral spine while standing.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice3Txt: Hinge backward, keeping your back straight, and feel a deep stretch in your hamstrings.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice5Txt: Maintain smooth breathing throughout. Inhale as you lower yourself, exhale as you rise.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice6Txt: Hinge at your hips to fully stretch your hamstrings.
actionLibraryList.showDetails:
[{"context":"1.Relax your shoulders.
2.Keep your back straight and glutes engaged.
3.Slightly bend your knees.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749439326943.jpg"},{"context":"1.Keep your back straight.
2.Slightly bend your knees, keeping the barbell close to your body.
3.Feet hip-width apart.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749439330202.jpg"}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale on the way up, inhale on the way down.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a full stretch in your hamstrings as you hinge forward.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your knees only slightly bent.

actionLibraryList.title: Barbell Bulgarian Split Squat
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Stand about two feet away from the bench.
2.Rest the barbell across your upper traps behind your neck.
3.Lift one foot and place it on the edge of the bench behind you.
4.Bend your front knee and lower down until your front thigh is parallel to the ground and your back knee is close to the floor.
5.Drive through your front heel to return to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice1Txt: Lock the pulley block to the footboard end with the barbell attached.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice2Txt: Rest one leg on the bench behind you and bend your standing leg.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice5Txt: Keep breathing. Inhale during the downward phase, and exhale as you press to standing.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice6Txt: Press back to standing by pushing through your quads and glutes to power the upward phase.
actionLibraryList.showDetails:
[{"context":"1.Place the barbell across your upper traps behind your neck.
2.Keep your back straight and core engaged.
3.Bend your knees and place one foot behind you on the edge of a bench.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750838840540.jpg"},{"context":"1.Keep your back straight and core stable.
2.As you lower down, keep your knees aligned with your toes.
3.Don't let your back knee touch the ground, maintain constant muscle tension.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750838843690.jpg"}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale on the way up, inhale on the way down.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage your glutes and legs for power.

actionLibraryList.title: ​Bodyweight Reverse Plank March
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Start in a reverse plank with your legs extended.
2.Place your hands on the floor behind you and engage your core.
3.Raise your hips until your body forms a straight line.
4.Alternate lifting one leg, bending the knee toward your chest.
5.Keep the motion small and controlled, focusing on stability.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750662106540.jpg","context":"1.Lift your hips until your body forms a straight line."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750662110846.jpg","context":"1.Alternate lifting each knee toward your chest."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale as you lift your leg, inhale to return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your hips lifted and avoid shrugging your shoulders.

actionLibraryList.title: Half Kneeling Single-Arm Row
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Assume a half-kneeling position with one knee on the ground and the other leg forward at 90°.
2.Engage your core and keep your torso neutral.
3.Hold the handle with one hand using a neutral grip.
4.Pull your elbow back close to your body, driving your shoulder blade to retract.
5.Pause at the top for 1 second, feeling your back muscles tighten.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1751508078381.jpg","context":"1.Keep your back straight and spine neutral.\n2.Hold the handle with one hand using a neutral grip."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1751508083055.jpg","context":"1.Keep your elbow close to your body and pull it back, driving your shoulder blade to retract."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale as you pull, and inhale as you return to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Engage your back muscles to generate the force.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Throughout the movement, avoid shrugging your shoulders, twisting your waist, or using body momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Assisted Bent Knee Calf Raise
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Stand with your feet hip-width apart, hands on the support, and knees bent into a squat. Engage your core.
2.Exhale as you slowly lift your heels off the ground, reaching the highest point.Feel the activation in your lower calves and hold for 1 second at the peak.
3.Inhale as you lower your heels back to lightly touch the ground. Keep your body stable, avoiding excessive movement or using momentum.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750754219987.jpg","context":"1.Place your hands on the support, bend your knees, and squat down."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750754224085.jpg","context":"1.Slowly lift your heels off the ground, reaching the highest point."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale as you exert force, inhale as you return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your body stable, avoid excessive movement or using momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: Leg Curl Cross-Flatbench
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Adjust the rope to the 9th hole position.
2.Place the flat bench horizontally on the footboard, and attach the ankle strap to one leg.
3.Get into a four-point kneeling position, with your arms and thighs parallel and perpendicular to the floor. Place the strap behind you on the flat bench, supporting your body on your elbows.
4.Add weight, engage your leg muscles, and curl your lower leg upwards. Avoid using your lower back for assistance.
5.Breathe with your diaphragm, exhaling during exertion.
6.Tighten your core.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"context":"1.Set up the bench across from the machine, and put the strap on one leg.\n2.Get on all fours, with arms and legs parallel to each other and perpendicular to the floor; place the knee of the working leg on the bench and lower onto your elbows.\n3.Add weight, engage your leg muscles, and curl your lower leg upwards. Avoid using your lower back for assistance.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1682501571795.jpg"}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe with your diaphragm and exhale during each concentric phase.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Add weight, engage your leg muscles, and curl your lower leg upwards. Avoid using your lower back for assistance.
